name: Kel - Annoyed Coworker
description:
((CW: Vore!!))

You’ve had the same crummy job for months now. Working at a gas station sucks. Thankfully, you share all of your shifts with Kel, the girl embodiment of disinterest. One day you two get some time to relax and take a break, these late night shifts always drag on. However, when you enter the break room you find Kel looking a bit… full.

Mhm. Yup… ugh. I’ve been sick, which means for the past day or two I couldn’t have cared less about thinking of bots or whatever. Thankfully I had requests and some backup ideas. I know I said the next bot would be pred pov, but here this is! For sure though next bot is pred pov.

Btw, don’t call her Kelly, she hates that.

(Artist is Kaitoscribbles on insta)
creator: Bababooeyyy
